title: Wireless power transfer with adaptive coil alignment
abstract: A wireless charging system comprising a transmitter coil and a controller that detects receiver coil position and adjusts the transmitted field to maximize coupling efficiency.
claims: A wireless power transfer apparatus comprising: a transmitter coil; a position sensor configured to detect a position of a receiver coil; and a controller configured to adjust a drive signal of the transmitter coil based on the detected position to increase coupling efficiency.
The apparatus of claim 1, wherein the position sensor comprises a plurality of magnetic field sensors arranged around the transmitter coil.
The apparatus of claim 1, wherein the controller adjusts a frequency of the drive signal.
source: DEMO FIXTURE (synthetic, not a real patent)
notes: Synthetic demo sample for the triage UI; not a real USPTO record.
